title: Moonshot
lyrics: Nagame te iru bakari
Te wo nobashite omoidasu
Kikaretakunai yowane
Kikasetai koe
Fukanou mo kanousei da
Kimi ga dare nanda ka shitten da
Shoumei shiyou bokura
Hontou wa dou shitai?
Nigetai to mimi fusai da
Shagamu shinzou wo tataitetta Swing by
Kawaranai hyoujou ni kotae wo tsukitatete
Jounetsu wa tsuki ni mukatte ute sniper
Mirai wa douyara kimi shidai
Nodo ga kawaita tte koukai wa nai wa
Surimuite umeru no 99% kobushi ni wa shoudou wo
Hontou wa dou shitain dakke
Aizu shite heart tune ni nosete
【Ah, ah Darlin' I know who you are. Ah, Ah】
Ichiban nori de Fly me to the moon
【Ah, ah Darlin' I know who you are. Ah, Ah】
